title: Golden Age RPG
description: Golden Age RPG is a medieval fantasy modpack that provides a fun and challenging experience. With an enticing adventure to engage with your friends with supported multiplayer playability. As well as a multitude of ways to defeat thy foes!
body:
A modpack that feels like Daggerfall for it's RPG adventure gameplay and includes multiplayer support. Glory and riches awaits, but only for the worthy.

##
### **DESCRIPTION**                                     
An optimized and minimalistic RPG focused modpack created for 1.20.1, that introduces numerous content ranging from weapons to armor, structures and new mobs to slay. Player progression with engaging difficulty, creative illustrated roleplay elements, dungeons to discover and loot with challenging boss fights and tough mob encounters. Also multiplayer supported with essential so you can play with your friends with stability. A configureable progression skill tree you can open by pressing K, with 3 paths to choose from, Rogue, Warrior and Initiate that gives you interchangeable and dynamic abilities to tailor the gameplay to your preference.

##
### **FEATURES**                                        
* Difficulty - difficulty is scaled, the more you play and the further out you explore, the harder the mobs get.
* Voice Chat - talk to people in game.
* Skill Tree - extensive skill tree with different paths to choose from.
* Paths - choose from paths such as berserker, archer, rogue and etc.
* Teams - get friends in your guild and explore the world together.
* Audio Enhancements - ambient sounds in biomes, reverb and echoes in large spaces, custom soundtrack.
* Trade - setup shops and trade with villagers or other people.
* Structures - explore many structures across the world, structures are spread out.
* Races - You can pick your own race classification to start off as to change the playstyle as well as perspective, just a few race selections that can be chosen are Human, Elf, Goblin, Dwarf, Ogre and many many more. Every race has their own unique specificiations that they thrive in but also come with some weaknesses in addition, depending on their environment.
* Optimization - a lot of the lag is alleviated and remedied so lower end systems can run it.
* Essential - let's you open your world to friends and play the modpack with them.
* Embeddium - a performance enhancing client side mod, to allow you to play more optimally.
* Iris Shaders - let's you enable shaders to make the game look and feel more beautiful.
##
Optional Mods: 
* [Reignited HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/reignited-hud)
* [Origins++](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins-plus-plus)
* [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)
##
### **SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS**
  
Required 4 GB of memory at minimal. 8 GB is recommended for optimal play.

This modpack is required on server and client.
##
